title: Chair for correction of posture
snippet: The present invention relates to a chair to correct the posture of a user. The present invention is to provide a chair to correct the posture of a user, which detects the position and posture of the user sitting on the chair to output a correction signal to allow the user to keep a good posture. To this end, according to the present invention, the chair comprises: a seat where a user sits; a back installed on one side of the seat to support the back of the user; a supporter installed on a bottom side of the seat; an input unit installed on the seat to detect a motion setting signal of a sensor unit to detect a posture from the user; the sensor unit installed on a random position of the seat and the back to detect and output a position signal in accordance with the users sitting position; a control unit which compares the sitting position signal of the user detected by the sensor unit with a preset posture correction position signal to control the output of a posture correction signal in accordance with the result of the comparison; and an alert unit which, when the posture correction signal is outputted by the control unit, outputs a warning sound. As such, the present invention is able to detect the position and posture of a user sitting on the chair and output a correction signal, thereby allowing the user to take and keep a good posture.
userNotes: This patent describes a chair with sensors to detect user posture and an alert system to signal correction. It aims to help users maintain good posture by comparing detected posture with a preset correction signal.

title: Posture correction warning chair
snippet: The present invention relates to a posture correction warning chair, which enables recognition of a current posture by a posture sensor, a notification through vibration to a user by a diaphragm, and a signal to the user through a sound alarm by a speaker. By allowing people to sit for a long time, they can solve the problem that their posture collapses unconsciously the longer they sit, thereby solving the existing problem that their posture collapses unconsciously the longer they sit.  That is, the present invention is a posture sensor configured by placing a sensor on the back portion to recognize the current posture in a chair, a vibration plate configured in a square plate shape to give a notification to the user through vibration, and a user through a sound alarm. It consists of a speaker located on the neck of the backrest to give a signal to the user, a chair body composed of a soft cushion feeling so that the user can sit comfortably, and four wheels to facilitate the movement of the chair.  Therefore, the present invention enables the user to recognize the current posture by the posture sensor, to give a notification to the user through vibration by the diaphragm, and to give a signal to the user through a sound alarm by the speaker, so that long sitting is possible. It has the effect of solving the existing problem that the posture collapses unconsciously the longer one sits by solving the problem that the posture collapses unconsciously the more one sits.
userNotes: This patent discloses a chair with a posture sensor on the backrest that detects posture and provides feedback via vibration and sound alarms to correct poor posture during prolonged sitting.

title: Chair for posture reform
snippet: Disclosed is a posture correcting chair in which a user can recognize the posture of a user sitting on a chair. In the chair comprising a seat plate which can be seated by the user, the seat plate which is generally perpendicular to the seat plate, a back support for supporting the user's back and a support leg installed on the bottom of the seat plate, wherein the posture correcting chair is mounted on the seat plate. At least one seat detection means installed, at least one attitude detection means installed on the backrest and vibration means provided on the seat plate or backrest. The posture correcting chair detects that the user sits on the chair by means of a seating detecting means, and detects whether the user's back is closely attached to the back of the chair by the posture detecting means, such as a vibration or an alarm sound when the posture is not correct. By using the alarm means to allow the user to recognize his or her incorrect posture, the user can always sit in the correct posture on the chair.
userNotes: This patent describes a posture correcting chair with sensors on the seat and backrest to detect sitting and posture, providing vibration or sound alarms for incorrect posture.

title: Sitting posture detection chair
snippet: The present invention relates to a sitting posture sensing chair, and more specifically, by detecting whether the person sitting on the chair is in the correct posture or sitting for a long time, an alarm can be provided to the seated person to guide the seated person to the correct posture. This is about a posture-sensing chair mounted on a chair that can prevent diseases that may occur due to this condition.
userNotes: This patent relates to a chair that detects sitting posture and provides an alarm to guide the user to the correct posture, aiming to prevent posture-related diseases from prolonged sitting.

title: Posture correction chair System
snippet: An objective of the present invention is to provide a posture correction chair system installed in equipment, such as a chair, to correctly detect a seating state of a user. According to the present invention, the system comprises: a posture detection sensor including a plurality of sensors to detect whether or not a body part of a user is in contact with a chair when the user sits on the chair; a control unit determining a sitting posture of the user based on information extracted through a posture detection unit to generate a posture detection signal; a sound output unit to receive the posture detection signal to output a warning sound; a communication unit to transmit the posture detection signal to the sound output unit and a terminal; and a power signal transmission unit receiving the posture detection signal to supply or cut off power for a television (TV) set.
userNotes: This patent describes a posture correction chair system with multiple sensors to detect body contact, a control unit to determine posture and generate signals, and output units for sound and terminal communication.

title: Chair with posture alarm
snippet: The utility model provides a chair with an alarm for incorrect sitting posture, which includes a chair surface, a chair back connected with the chair surface and four supporting legs. The chair surface is provided with a first sensor, and the front of the chair back is provided with a first sensor. Two sensors, the back of the chair is provided with an alarm. The beneficial effect of the utility model is that a first sensor is provided on the chair surface, which can be sensed when a person sits on it, and a second sensor is provided on the back of the chair, which can sense the position of the back of the human body. When it is not within the range, the alarm will alarm to remind people to adjust their sitting posture, which is beneficial for people to develop a correct sitting posture and good for their health.
userNotes: This patent describes a chair with sensors on the seat and backrest that trigger an alarm if the user's posture is incorrect.

title: System for improving body posture
snippet: A system is provided for inducing improvement in sitting posture. The system is associated with a seating device having a seat and a backrest. The system includes a first member associated with the seat or with the backrest and a second member associated with the backrest. At least one sensor is located in the first member for detecting the presence of a user and for providing an indication of the presence of the user. At least one sensor is located in the second member for detecting the position of the user's back and for providing an indication of the position of the user's back. An alarm is connected to the sensors for informing the user whether the sitting posture is correct or incorrect, based on the indications of the sensors.
userNotes: This patent details a system for improving posture using sensors in a seating device to detect user presence and back position, triggering an alarm for incorrect posture.

title: A sitting posture monitoring chair
snippet: The invention discloses a sitting posture monitoring chair, which comprises chair legs, a seat board, a backrest, a tilt detection switch for detecting the pressure state of the seat board, and a leaning detection switch for detecting the pressure state of the backrest, the tilt detection switch The control circuit is connected with the leaning detection switch, and the control circuit judges whether the sitting posture of the human body is correct according to the opening and closing states of the tilt detection switch and the leaning detection switch, and when a bad sitting posture is detected or the duration of maintaining the bad sitting posture reaches the set time , drive the reminder device to give an alarm. In the present invention, by installing a detection device on the seat that people must use when they work and study, the seat has the supervision function of detecting the sitting posture of the human body. Because the seat allows the user to sit in a bad posture in a short period of time, the user's sitting comfort and psychological acceptance are improved without affecting the user's spine, lumbar spine and vision.
userNotes: This patent describes a chair with a tilt detection switch on the seat and a leaning detection switch on the backrest, which, when combined with a control circuit, triggers an alarm for bad sitting posture.

title: Movable seat surface posture correcting chair with real-time monitoring and alarm function
snippet: A posture correcting chair with a movable seat surface and a real-time monitoring and alarm function relates to a posture correcting chair. In order to solve the problem that the posture correction effect of the current posture correction chair is not good. It includes a seat surface, a seat seat and a chair back, and it also includes a support sensing device, a seat back position adjustment device and an alarm device; The back side of the seat is used to adjust the horizontal distance between the back of the chair and the seat surface. The support sensing device is arranged on the front side of the bottom surface of the seat surface. When the support sensing device is pressed by the seat surface, the support sensing device outputs a sensing signal to the alarm device. It is used to correct sitting posture.
userNotes: This patent describes a posture correcting chair with a movable seat surface, a support sensing device on the seat, and an alarm device for monitoring and correcting posture.

title: One kind of warning device to prevent poor sitting posture
snippet: This creation is a bad sitting posture warning device can be firmly attached in a chair, with the sensors to sense if someone sitting in a chair. This device may set the sensors close and fixed at one or more specific locations of the back or seat of a chair, to sense whether the sitter's back or buttock touch these sensors or not, when the sitter's back or buttock separate from these sensors, it can generate alert signals to alert the sitter having bad sitting posture; or when the sitter is continuously sitting on the chairs for longer than a period of time, the device will generate alert signals to remind the sitter to get away from the chair.
userNotes: This patent describes a warning device for a chair with sensors to detect if someone is sitting and to alert them if their back or buttocks are not in contact, or if they have been sitting too long.
